name: Benediction of Omniscience
effect: The unit may re-roll ranged hit rolls of 1.

name: Chant of the Remorseless Fist
effect: The unit may re-roll melee hit rolls of 1.

name: Incantation of the Iron Soul
effect: The target can't gain Battleshock tokens by any means and loses all current tokens.

name: Litany of the Electromancer
effect: The unit's melee attacks gain "Tesla". Weapons that already have the "Tesla" special rule always hit on a 4+.

name: Mantra of Discipline
effect: After performing a Defensive Reaction, the unit's order is not removed. Instead, replace it with a "Fight" order.

name: Panegyric Procession
effect: The unit increases the Strength of all of its Heavy weapons by 1.

name: Plea of the Veiled Hunter
effect: A single unit that passes its Canticle roll is removed from the battlefield and placed into reserves. It may later redeploy as though it had "Outflank".

name: Verse of Vengeance
effect: Destroyed models in this unit are not removed until they complete their activation this turn.
